# Summary
My name is Anna Kate Roper and this is my comp110 website. In this project I looked at how practice problems impacted quiz grades and difficulty of the class. I looked for a relationship between these.

<!-- This is a comment. Below, you'll see code for inserting an image. To make this image appear, update <custom-path>. To add an image, save it inside the imgs folder of this repository. -->

## Conclusion.

From this analysis I found that there was a relationship between the amount of practice someone does with their quiz scores. The more practice they did, the better the quiz score was and the less difficult they found the class to be.
